Re-adjudication Request for Claim Invoice 73617
Patient: GHAIB MOSHABAB ASEERY (MRN: 19652)
Visit Date: 2025-11-26 00:00:00
Diagnosis: A09-Diarrhoea and gastroenteritis of presumed infectious origin,C22-Malignant neoplasm of liver and intrahepatic bile ducts,N39.0-Urinary tract infection, site not specified

TARIFF ADJUSTMENT (1 line(s), total difference: 0.01 SAR):
  The rejected amounts represent rounding differences of 0.01 SAR per line item.
  Per the agreed tariff schedule between Hayat National Hospital-ABHA and
  Ministry of Health, these amounts are within the contractual tolerance.
  Request: Accept the claimed amounts as per the agreed tariff rates.
  - Seq 25: MOHS-B0719 Claimed=548.44 Approved=548.43 Diff=0.01

MEDICAL NECESSITY (4 line(s)):
  The services below were medically necessary based on patient condition
  and diagnosis: A09-Diarrhoea and gastroenteritis of presumed infectious origin,C22-Malignant neoplasm of liver and intrahepatic bile ducts,N39.0-Urinary tract infection, site not specified.
  Supporting clinical documentation is available upon request.
  Request: Approve based on the documented clinical indication.
  - Seq 24: 05999057200363 - HUMAN ALBUMIN 20% SOLUTION FOR INFUSION (SAR 328.9)
  - Seq 21: 05999057200363 - HUMAN ALBUMIN 20% SOLUTION FOR INFUSION (SAR 328.9)
  - Seq 18: 05999057200363 - HUMAN ALBUMIN 20% SOLUTION FOR INFUSION (SAR 493.35)
  - Seq 16: 05999057200363 - HUMAN ALBUMIN 20% SOLUTION FOR INFUSION (SAR 493.35)

MEDICATION NOT REGISTERED (2 line(s)):
  The medications listed below were clinically necessary for patient care.
  These medications are approved by SFDA and were administered under physician
  supervision based on established clinical protocols.
  Request: Review and approve based on clinical necessity and SFDA registration status.
  - Seq 23: 99999999999999 - ZAVICEFTA 2 G/0.5 G VIAL (SAR 1361.25)
  - Seq 20: 99999999999999 - ZAVICEFTA 2 G/0.5 G VIAL (SAR 1361.25)

ROOM & BOARD INCLUSION (1 line(s)):
  The services below are distinct from room and board charges and should
  be billed separately per the agreed contract terms.
  Request: Unbundle and approve as separate line items.
  - Seq 11: 06285147802944 - VALES 500 MG CONCENTRATE FOR SOLUTION FOR INFUSION (SAR 205.6)

---
Total Claimed: 48463.61 SAR | Total Approved: 548.43 SAR | Gap: 47915.18 SAR
Provider: Hayat National Hospital-ABHA
Policy Holder: MINISTRY OF HEALTH CASES
